included: tracked repository source for which the project has authority to grant Apache-2.0 rights
deterministic source-candidate archives produced from an exact Git commit
excluded: vendored dependency source not already tracked in the repository

relationship_to_prior_review.effect: supersedes its 2026-07-12 no-publication conclusion only for the source-only scope named here
relationship_to_prior_review.preserved_boundary: bundled dependencies and other excluded artifacts remain uncleared

decision.reason: The reviewed source candidate contains project source and dependency references, not installed third-party packages. Metadata ambiguity therefore does not block publication of project-controlled source, but remains a review boundary for bundled artifacts.

does_not_establish: authority to relicense independently copyrighted historical contributions without any consent legally required
clearance for binary, wheel, container, model, or dataset distribution
absence of third-party copyright or trademark claims
